chunks.text: Learning to Drive by Imitating Surrounding Vehicles (EECS-2025-14) by Yasin Sonmez, Hanna Krasowski and Murat Arcak. Improving Parking Lot Efficiency through Autonomous Control and Assignment Strategies: A Microscopic Traffic Simulation Analysis (EECS-2023-166) by Alex Wong. GeneDrive.jl: A Julian Approach to Simulating Biological Dynamics and Control (EECS-2023-49) by Valeri Vasquez, Murat Arcak and David Anthoff.
chunks.question: What are three technical reports listed under Murat Arcak?
chunks.answer: Driving imitation, parking efficiency, GeneDrive.jl simulation.

chunks.text: Characterizations and Computation of Controlled Invariants for Monotone Dynamical Systems (EECS-2022-2) by Adnane Saoud and Murat Arcak. Monotonicity-Based Symbolic Control for Safety in Real Driving Scenarios (EECS-2021-5) by Stanley Smith, Adnane Saoud and Murat Arcak. Risk-Sensitive Safety Analysis and Control for Trustworthy Autonomy (EECS-2020-66) by Margaret Chapman.
chunks.question: Which reports focus on monotone systems and safety control?
chunks.answer: Controlled invariants, symbolic safety, risk-sensitive analysis.

chunks.text: Motion Planning of the Sit to Stand Movement for Powered Lower Limb Orthoses (EECS-2017-148) by Octavio Narvaez-Aroche, Andrew Packard and Murat Arcak. A Compartmental Lateral Inhibition System to Generate Contrasting Patterns (EECS-2015-173) by Ana Sofia Rufino Ferreira, Justin Hsia and Murat Arcak.
chunks.question: What are the two oldest technical reports listed?
chunks.answer: Motion planning for orthoses, lateral inhibition system.
